Paragraph.Text: the holder is a natural person who

Subparagraph.Label: (i)
Subparagraph.Text: is tax resident in the jurisdiction where the ultimate parent entity is located, and

Subparagraph.Label: (ii)
Subparagraph.Text: does not hold ownership interests that in the aggregate entitle the holder to more than 5% of the profits or assets of the ultimate parent entity; or

Paragraph.Label: (c)
Paragraph.Text: the holder is a governmental entity, international organization, non-profit organization or pension fund that

Subparagraph.Label: (i)
Subparagraph.Text: is resident in the jurisdiction where the ultimate parent entity is located, and

Subparagraph.Label: (ii)
Subparagraph.Text: does not hold ownership interests that in the aggregate entitle the holder to more than 5% of the profits or assets of the ultimate parent entity.

Subsection.Text: For the purposes of subparagraph (1)(c)(i) and paragraph 21(1)(c),

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: an entity (other than a governmental entity) is resident in the jurisdiction where it is created and managed; and

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: a governmental entity is resident in the jurisdiction of the government of which it is a part or that owns it.

Subsection.MarginalNote: GloBE loss — flow-through ultimate parent entity
Subsection.Text: The GloBE loss, for a fiscal year, of an ultimate parent entity that is a flow-through entity is the amount determined by the formula

FormulaDefinition.Text: is the amount that would, in the absence of this subsection, be the ultimate parent entity’s GloBE loss for the year; and

is the portion of the loss amount referred to in the description of A that is attributable to an ownership interest in the entity, to the extent the holder of the ownership interest is allowed to use its share of the loss in computing the holder’s income for tax purposes.

Subsection.MarginalNote: Permanent establishment — flow-through ultimate parent entity
Subsection.Text: Subsections (1) to (3) apply to a permanent establishment in the same manner as they apply to an ultimate parent entity that is a flow-through entity, if

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: the ultimate parent entity carries on its business, in whole or in part, through the permanent establishment; or

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: the following conditions are met:

Subparagraph.Label: (i)
Subparagraph.Text: a flow-through entity carries on its business, in whole or in part, through the permanent establishment, and

Subparagraph.Label: (ii)
Subparagraph.Text: the ultimate parent entity holds its interest in the flow-through entity directly or through a tax transparent structure.

Subsection.Text: The GloBE income, for a fiscal year, of an ultimate parent entity that is subject to a deductible dividend regime and distributes a deductible dividend within 12 months of the end of the fiscal year excludes the amount of the dividend (except to the extent its exclusion would result in a GloBE loss for the year), if

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: one of the following conditions is met:

Subparagraph.Label: (i)
Subparagraph.Text: the dividend recipient is subject to tax, for a taxable period that ends within 12 months of the end of the fiscal year, on the full amount of the dividend at a nominal rate that is equal to, or exceeds, the minimum rate,

Subparagraph.Label: (ii)
Subparagraph.Text: it can reasonably be expected that

FormulaDefinition.Text: is the amount that would, in the absence of this subsection and paragraph 22(4)(b), be adjusted covered taxes payable by the ultimate parent entity in respect of the dividend or the profits out of which the dividend is paid,
is the tax payable in respect of the dividend by the dividend recipient for a taxable period ending within 12 months of the end of the fiscal year,
is the amount of the dividend, and
is the minimum rate, or

Subparagraph.Label: (iii)
Subparagraph.Text: it is the case that

Clause.Label: (A)
Clause.Text: the dividend recipient is a natural person,

Clause.Label: (B)
Clause.Text: the dividend recipient is subject to tax in respect of the dividend for a taxable period that ends within 12 months of the end of the fiscal year, and

Clause.Label: (C)
Clause.Text: the dividend is a patronage dividend from a supply cooperative;

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: the dividend recipient is a natural person who

Subparagraph.Label: (i)
Subparagraph.Text: is tax resident in the jurisdiction where the ultimate parent entity is located, and

Subparagraph.Label: (ii)
Subparagraph.Text: does not hold ownership interests that in the aggregate entitle the holder to more than 5% of the profits or assets of the ultimate parent entity; or

Paragraph.Label: (c)
Paragraph.Text: the dividend recipient is resident in the jurisdiction where the ultimate parent entity is located and is

Subparagraph.Label: (i)
Subparagraph.Text: a governmental entity,

Subparagraph.Label: (ii)
Subparagraph.Text: an international organization,

Subparagraph.Label: (iii)
Subparagraph.Text: a non-profit organization, or

Subparagraph.Label: (iv)
Subparagraph.Text: a pension fund that is not a pension services entity.

Subsection.Text: If subsection (1) applies to exclude a particular amount from the GloBE income of an ultimate parent entity, the entity’s GloBE income also excludes the amount of the entity’s covered taxes that are, because of the exclusion of the particular amount from its GloBE income, excluded from the entity’s adjusted covered taxes under paragraph 22(4)(b).

Subsections (1) and (2) apply, with such modifications as the context requires, to a group entity for a fiscal year in respect of a particular deductible dividend distributed by the group entity directly or indirectly to the ultimate parent entity, to the extent that

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: the group entity is located in the same jurisdiction as the ultimate parent entity;

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: the group entity is subject to the deductible dividend regime;

Paragraph.Label: (c)
Paragraph.Text: the ultimate parent entity’s ownership interests in the group entity are held directly or through a chain of group entities that meet the conditions in paragraphs (a) and (b);

Paragraph.Label: (d)
Paragraph.Text: the ultimate parent entity distributes, within 12 months of the end of the fiscal year, the amount it received in respect of the particular deductible dividend; and

Paragraph.Label: (e)
Paragraph.Text: the distribution by the ultimate parent entity is a deductible dividend in respect of which a condition in any of paragraphs (1)(a) to (c) is met.

Subsection.Text: For the purposes of clause (1)(a)(iii)(B), a patronage dividend from a supply cooperative is deemed to be subject to tax to the extent that it reduces a cost or expense that is otherwise deductible in computing the recipient’s income for tax purposes.

The adjusted covered taxes, of a constituent entity of an MNE group for a fiscal year, means the current tax expense, in respect of covered taxes, in the constituent entity’s financial accounts for the fiscal year, adjusted by the following:

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: the positive or negative amount determined by the formula

FormulaDefinition.Text: is the total of the additions to covered taxes, in respect of the constituent entity for the fiscal year, under subsection (2), and
is the total of the reductions to covered taxes, in respect of the constituent entity for the fiscal year, under subsection (3);

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: the total deferred tax adjustment amount of the constituent entity for the fiscal year, unless paragraph 26(b) or (c) applies in respect of the year and the jurisdiction in which the constituent entity is located; and

Paragraph.Label: (c)
Paragraph.Text: each amount recorded in the equity or other comprehensive income of the constituent entity for the fiscal year that can reasonably be considered to relate to an increase or decrease in respect of covered taxes, if

Subparagraph.Label: (i)
Subparagraph.Text: the covered taxes are in respect of an amount (referred to in this paragraph as the “included amount”) included in the constituent entity’s GloBE income or loss for the fiscal year, and

Subparagraph.Label: (ii)
Subparagraph.Text: the included amount is subject to tax under the laws of the jurisdiction in which the constituent entity is located.

Subsection.Text: For the purposes of subsection (1), each of the following amounts is an addition to covered taxes in respect of a constituent entity of an MNE group for a fiscal year:

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: an amount recorded as an expense, in respect of covered taxes, in profit before taxation in the constituent entity’s financial accounts for the fiscal year;

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: the constituent entity’s share of a GloBE loss deferred tax asset of the MNE group that is reversed in the fiscal year;

Paragraph.Label: (c)
Paragraph.Text: an amount paid, in respect of covered taxes, in the fiscal year to the extent that the amount

Subparagraph.Label: (i)
Subparagraph.Text: relates to an uncertain tax position, and

Subparagraph.Label: (ii)
Subparagraph.Text: was treated as a reduction to the constituent entity’s covered taxes for a preceding fiscal year under paragraph (3)(d); and

Paragraph.Label: (d)
Paragraph.Text: an amount of a credit or refund — or an amount in respect of a transfer — in respect of a qualified refundable tax credit or a marketable transferable tax credit, that is recorded as a reduction in the current tax expense, in respect of covered taxes, in the financial accounts of the constituent entity for the fiscal year.

Subsection.Text: For the purposes of subsection (1), each of the following amounts is a reduction to covered taxes in respect of a constituent entity for a fiscal year:

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: in respect of an amount of income that is not included in computing the constituent entity’s GloBE income or loss,

Subparagraph.Label: (i)
Subparagraph.Text: any portion of the constituent entity’s current tax expense, in respect of covered taxes, in its financial accounts (referred to in this subsection as “relevant current tax expense”) for the fiscal year that relates to the amount of income, or

Subparagraph.Label: (ii)
Subparagraph.Text: any portion of an addition to covered taxes, in respect of the constituent entity for the fiscal year under subsection (2), that relates to the amount of income;

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: in respect of a tax credit (other than a qualified refundable tax credit, marketable transferable tax credit or tax credit the tax benefit of which is a flow-through tax benefit) that is used to reduce the constituent entity’s liability for a covered tax,

Subparagraph.Label: (i)
Subparagraph.Text: if the tax credit is a non-marketable transferable tax credit that was purchased by the constituent entity, the amount by which the face value of the tax credit exceeds its purchase price in proportion to the amount of the tax credit used to reduce the constituent entity’s liability for a covered tax for a taxable period that ends during the fiscal year, except any amount that is recorded as a reduction to the constituent entity’s relevant current tax expense for the fiscal year, and

Subparagraph.Label: (ii)
Subparagraph.Text: in any other case, the portion of the tax credit that is

Clause.Label: (A)
Clause.Text: used to reduce the constituent entity’s liability for a covered tax for a taxable period that ends during the fiscal year, and

Clause.Label: (B)
Clause.Text: not recorded as a reduction to the constituent entity’s relevant current tax expense for the fiscal year;

Paragraph.Label: (c)
Paragraph.Text: in respect of the transfer of a non-marketable transferable tax credit (other than a tax credit the tax benefit of which is a flow-through tax benefit),

Subparagraph.Label: (i)
Subparagraph.Text: if the constituent entity is an originator of the tax credit, any amount received by the constituent entity in exchange for the transfer of the tax credit during the fiscal year, and

Subparagraph.Label: (ii)
Subparagraph.Text: if the constituent entity is a purchaser of the tax credit and transfers the tax credit to another person during the fiscal year, the amount of any gain on that transfer;

Paragraph.Label: (d)
Paragraph.Text: any portion of any amount that is credited or refunded to the constituent entity (other than in respect of a qualified refundable tax credit, marketable transferable tax credit or tax credit the tax benefit of which is a flow-through tax benefit), in respect of covered taxes, that is not treated as an adjustment to the constituent entity’s relevant current tax expense for the fiscal year;

Paragraph.Label: (e)
Paragraph.Text: any portion of the constituent entity’s relevant current tax expense for the fiscal year that relates to an uncertain tax position; and

Paragraph.Label: (f)
Paragraph.Text: any portion of the constituent entity’s relevant current tax expense for the fiscal year that is not expected to be paid on or before the day that is three years after the day on which the fiscal year ends.

Subsection.Text: For greater certainty,

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: if an amount is excluded in computing the GloBE income of a constituent entity under subsection 20(1), the entity’s adjusted covered taxes are to be reduced proportionally; and

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: if an amount is excluded in computing the GloBE income of a constituent entity under subsection 21(1), the entity’s adjusted covered taxes (other than the taxes for which a dividend deduction under that subsection was allowed) are to be reduced proportionally.

Subsection.MarginalNote: Adjusted covered taxes — no double counting
Subsection.Text: For the purposes of determining a constituent entity’s adjusted covered taxes, an amount, in respect of covered taxes, is not to be taken into account more than once in determining the adjusted covered taxes of

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: a constituent entity for a particular fiscal year or another fiscal year; or

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: more than one constituent entity for a particular fiscal year or another fiscal year.

Subsection.Text: Covered taxes means taxes (other than excluded taxes) that

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: are recorded in the financial accounts of a particular constituent entity in respect of its

Subparagraph.Label: (i)
Subparagraph.Text: income or profits, or

Subparagraph.Label: (ii)
Subparagraph.Text: share of the income or profits of another entity that is

Clause.Label: (A)
Clause.Text: a group entity in respect of the particular constituent entity, and

Clause.Label: (B)
Clause.Text: an entity in which the particular constituent entity holds, directly or indirectly, an ownership interest;

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: are imposed under an eligible distribution tax system;

Paragraph.Label: (c)
Paragraph.Text: are imposed in lieu of an income or profits tax of general application; or

Paragraph.Label: (d)
Paragraph.Text: are charged by reference to

Subparagraph.Label: (i)
Subparagraph.Text: retained earnings and corporate equity, or

Subparagraph.Label: (ii)
Subparagraph.Text: multiple components consisting of retained earnings, corporate equity and income or profits.

Subsection.Text: Excluded taxes means

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: any tax under a qualified IIR;

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: any tax under a qualified domestic minimum top-up tax;

Paragraph.Label: (c)
Paragraph.Text: any tax under, or as a result of the application of, a qualified UTPR;

Paragraph.Label: (d)
Paragraph.Text: a disqualified refundable imputation tax; and

Paragraph.Label: (e)
Paragraph.Text: a tax paid or accrued by an insurance company in respect of returns to policyholders.

Section.MarginalNote: Allocation of covered taxes to a permanent establishment

Subsection.Text: An amount in respect of covered taxes is allocated from a particular constituent entity to a permanent establishment for a fiscal year if

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: the permanent establishment is a group entity in respect of the particular constituent entity; and

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: the amount is

Subparagraph.Label: (i)
Subparagraph.Text: recorded in the financial accounts of the particular constituent entity, and

Subparagraph.Label: (ii)
Subparagraph.Text: in respect of the GloBE income or loss of the permanent establishment for the fiscal year.

Subsection.Text: If subsection 18(26) applies in respect of a permanent establishment and the main entity in respect of the permanent establishment, the following rules apply:

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: a deferred tax expense in respect of a deferred tax asset is excluded in computing the adjusted covered taxes of the permanent establishment and the main entity if

Subparagraph.Label: (i)
Subparagraph.Text: the deferred tax asset is attributable to a tax loss arising in the jurisdiction in which the permanent establishment is located, and

Subparagraph.Label: (ii)
Subparagraph.Text: the loss is treated as an expense of the main entity under paragraph 18(26)(a); and

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: if covered taxes arise in the jurisdiction in which the permanent establishment is located in respect of income (referred to in this paragraph as the “allocated income”) of the permanent establishment that is included in computing the GloBE income or loss of the main entity for a fiscal year under paragraph 18(26)(b), the covered taxes are allocated from the permanent establishment to the main entity for the fiscal year, to the extent of the lesser of

Subparagraph.Label: (i)
Subparagraph.Text: the amount of the covered taxes, and

Subparagraph.Label: (ii)
Subparagraph.Text: the amount determined by the formula

FormulaDefinition.Text: is the allocated income, and
is the highest rate of corporate tax on ordinary income in the jurisdiction where the main entity is located.

Subsection.Text: An amount in respect of covered taxes is allocated from a tax transparent entity to its constituent entity-owner, to the extent that

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: the constituent entity-owner holds an ownership interest in the tax transparent entity; and

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: the amount is

Subparagraph.Label: (i)
Subparagraph.Text: recorded in the financial accounts of the tax transparent entity, and

Subparagraph.Label: (ii)
Subparagraph.Text: in respect of any portion of the net income or loss of the tax transparent entity that is included in computing the financial accounting income of the constituent entity-owner because of paragraphs 17(6)(b) and (c).

Subsection.Text: The following rules apply for the purposes of allocating, to a constituent entity (referred to in this subsection as the “controlled foreign company”) of an MNE group, amounts in respect of covered taxes to which a constituent entity-owner of the controlled foreign company is subject under a controlled foreign company tax regime:

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: subject to paragraphs (b) and (c), an amount in respect of covered taxes arising in a fiscal year is allocated from the constituent entity-owner to the controlled foreign company, if

Subparagraph.Label: (i)
Subparagraph.Text: the constituent entity-owner is located in one jurisdiction (referred to in this paragraph as the “parent jurisdiction”) and the controlled foreign company is located in another jurisdiction (referred to in this subsection as the “subsidiary jurisdiction”), and

Subparagraph.Label: (ii)
Subparagraph.Text: the amount is

Clause.Label: (A)
Clause.Text: recorded in the financial accounts of the constituent entity-owner for the fiscal year, and

Clause.Label: (B)
Clause.Text: in respect of covered taxes, imposed under a controlled foreign company tax regime of the parent jurisdiction, applicable in respect of the constituent entity-owner’s share of the controlled foreign company’s income;

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: for the purposes of clause (a)(ii)(B), in the case of covered taxes imposed under a blended controlled foreign company tax regime that are recorded in the financial accounts of a constituent entity-owner for a fiscal year that is a transitional special allocation year, the amount in respect of the covered taxes applicable in respect of the constituent entity-owner’s share of the controlled foreign company’s income for the fiscal year is deemed to be equal to the amount determined by the formula

FormulaDefinition.Text: is the total amount, in respect of covered taxes imposed under the blended controlled foreign company tax regime, that is recorded in the financial accounts of the constituent entity-owner for the fiscal year,
is the amount determined by the formula
is the constituent entity-owner’s share of the income of the controlled foreign company, as determined under the blended controlled foreign company tax regime in computing the covered taxes, and
is the result of the formula

is the lowest rate that, if it were the corporate tax rate applicable in the subsidiary jurisdiction, would result in the tax charge in the subsidiary jurisdiction in respect of the controlled foreign company being sufficient to prevent a tax charge on the constituent entity-owner under the blended controlled foreign company tax regime in respect of its share of the income of the controlled foreign company for the fiscal year, and

is the rate that would be the effective tax rate of the MNE group for the subsidiary jurisdiction for the fiscal year, if the jurisdictional adjusted covered taxes of the MNE group for the subsidiary jurisdiction were

FormulaParagraph.Label: (i)
FormulaParagraph.Text: determined without regard to any covered taxes imposed under a controlled foreign company tax regime, and

FormulaParagraph.Label: (ii)
FormulaParagraph.Text: increased by an amount equal to the tax payable for the fiscal year, in respect of the standard constituent entities of the MNE group that are located in the subsidiary jurisdiction, under a qualified domestic minimum top-up tax of the subsidiary jurisdiction, to the extent the blended controlled foreign company tax regime allows a foreign tax credit for that tax payable on the same terms as any other creditable covered tax, and

FormulaDefinition.Text: is the total of all amounts each of which is an amount that would be determined for B if

FormulaParagraph.Label: (i)
FormulaParagraph.Text: all references in the description of B to “the controlled foreign company” and “the subsidiary jurisdiction” were read as references to “an entity in which the constituent entity-owner holds an ownership interest” and “the jurisdiction where the entity is located”, respectively, and

FormulaParagraph.Label: (ii)
FormulaParagraph.Text: where an entity is located in a jurisdiction for which an effective tax rate of the MNE group is not determined for the fiscal year, the effective tax rate of the MNE group for that jurisdiction for the year were determined based on the aggregate income and taxes recorded in the financial accounts of all entities, that are located in the jurisdiction, in which the constituent entity-owner holds an ownership interest, and as if those entities were constituent entities of the MNE group; and

Paragraph.Label: (c)
Paragraph.Text: if the covered taxes, in respect of which an amount would, in the absence of this paragraph, be allocated from the constituent entity-owner to the controlled foreign company under paragraph (a), are applicable in whole or in part in respect of passive income of the controlled foreign company, the amount allocated under paragraph (a) in respect of the portion of the covered taxes that are applicable in respect of the passive income is not to exceed the lesser of

Subparagraph.Label: (i)
Subparagraph.Text: the amount that would, in the absence of this paragraph, be allocated under paragraph (a) in respect of the portion of the covered taxes that are applicable in respect of the passive income, and

Subparagraph.Label: (ii)
Subparagraph.Text: the amount determined by the formula

FormulaDefinition.Text: is the amount of the controlled foreign company’s passive income included under the controlled foreign company tax regime in computing the covered taxes, and
is the top-up percentage of the MNE group for the subsidiary jurisdiction, determined without regard to any amount that is described in subparagraph (i).

Subsection.Text: The following rules apply for the purposes of allocating amounts in respect of covered taxes from a constituent entity-owner to a constituent entity (referred to in this subsection as the “hybrid entity”) of an MNE group that is a hybrid entity in relation to the constituent entity-owner:

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: subject to paragraph (b), an amount in respect of covered taxes (referred to in this subsection as the “covered taxes amount”) recorded in the financial accounts of the constituent entity-owner for a fiscal year is allocated from the constituent entity-owner to the hybrid entity to the extent the covered taxes are in respect of income of the hybrid entity; and

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: if the covered taxes are, in whole or in part, in respect of passive income of the hybrid entity, the amount to be allocated from the constituent entity-owner to the hybrid entity under paragraph (a), in respect of the portion of the covered taxes that are in respect of the hybrid entity’s passive income, is not to exceed the lesser of

Subparagraph.Label: (i)
Subparagraph.Text: the portion of the covered taxes amount that is in respect of the hybrid entity’s passive income, and

Subparagraph.Label: (ii)
Subparagraph.Text: the amount determined by the formula

FormulaDefinition.Text: is the amount of the hybrid entity’s passive income that is included in computing the covered taxes of the constituent entity-owner under the fiscal transparency rule in the jurisdiction where it is located, and

is the top-up percentage of the MNE group for the jurisdiction where the hybrid entity is located, determined without regard to the portion of the covered taxes amount that is in respect of the hybrid entity’s passive income.

Subsection.Text: An amount in respect of covered taxes (referred to in this subsection as the “covered taxes amount”) for a fiscal year is allocated from a constituent entity-owner to a particular constituent entity in which it holds a direct ownership interest, if the covered taxes amount is

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: recorded in the financial accounts of the constituent entity-owner for the fiscal year; and

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: in respect of a dividend or similar amount, in respect of the direct ownership interest, that is distributed — or deemed, under the tax laws of the jurisdiction in which the particular constituent entity is located, to be distributed — by the particular constituent entity to the constituent entity-owner in the fiscal year.

Section.MarginalNote: Definition of total deferred tax adjustment amount

Subsection.Text: The total deferred tax adjustment amount, of a constituent entity for a fiscal year, means the positive or negative amount determined by the formula

FormulaDefinition.Text: is

FormulaParagraph.Label: (a)
FormulaParagraph.Text: if the tax rate applicable in determining the constituent entity’s deferred tax expense, in respect of covered taxes, recorded in its financial accounts for the year exceeds the minimum rate, the amount that would be the constituent entity’s deferred tax expense in respect of covered taxes (subject to the exclusions under subsection (2)), if the applicable tax rate were the minimum rate, and

FormulaParagraph.Label: (b)
FormulaParagraph.Text: in any other case, the constituent entity’s deferred tax expense, in respect of covered taxes, recorded in its financial accounts for the year (subject to the exclusions under subsection (2));

FormulaDefinition.Text: is the total of all amounts each of which is

FormulaParagraph.Label: (a)
FormulaParagraph.Text: an amount paid in the year in respect of an unclaimed accrual of the constituent entity, or

FormulaParagraph.Label: (b)
FormulaParagraph.Text: the amount of any recaptured deferred tax liability determined for a preceding fiscal year that reverses in the year; and

FormulaDefinition.Text: is the total of all amounts each of which is

FormulaParagraph.Label: (a)
FormulaParagraph.Text: a reduction to the amount determined for A that would have occurred due to the recognition of a loss deferred tax asset for a current year tax loss but for the recognition criteria under the applicable accounting standard having not been met, or

FormulaParagraph.Label: (b)
FormulaParagraph.Text: to the extent not reflected as a reduction in determining the amount for A, the amount by which a deferred tax asset has increased because of subsection (5).

Subsection.MarginalNote: Total deferred tax adjustment amount — exclusions
Subsection.Text: In determining the amount for A in subsection (1), the following are to be excluded:

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: the portion of deferred tax expense that is in respect of

Subparagraph.Label: (i)
Subparagraph.Text: an item that is not included in computing GloBE income or loss,

Subparagraph.Label: (ii)
Subparagraph.Text: a disallowed accrual or an unclaimed accrual, or

Subparagraph.Label: (iii)
Subparagraph.Text: the generation or use of a tax credit;

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: the effect of any valuation adjustment or accounting recognition adjustment in respect of a deferred tax asset; and

Paragraph.Label: (c)
Paragraph.Text: the portion of deferred tax expense that arises because of a re-measurement with respect to a change in the rate of tax applicable in determining the deferred tax expense.

Subsection.MarginalNote: Foreign tax credits — substitute loss carry-forward
Subsection.Text: Despite subparagraph (2)(a)(iii), deferred tax expense must be included in determining the amount for A in subsection (1) if it is in respect of a deferred tax asset in respect of

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: a substitute loss carry-forward tax credit, except that, in a fiscal year in which the substitute loss carry-forward tax credit is used, the deferred tax expense is to be included only to the extent the substitute loss carry-forward tax credit is used to reduce or eliminate covered taxes in respect of income that is included in computing the constituent entity’s GloBE income or loss; or

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: a substitute loss carry-forward recapture amount.

Subsection.Text: To the extent it would not otherwise arise or reverse, as the case may be, a deferred tax asset is deemed, in respect of a substitute loss carry-forward recapture amount of a constituent entity that is located in a particular jurisdiction, to

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: arise in the fiscal year that the substitute loss carry-forward recapture amount arises, in an amount equal to the product obtained by multiplying the substitute loss carry-forward recapture amount by the statutory tax rate applicable to the constituent entity in the fiscal year under the income tax laws of the particular jurisdiction; and

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: reverse, in any fiscal year (referred to in this paragraph as a “recharacterization year”) in which a recharacterization of income (referred to in this paragraph as the “recharacterized income”) described in paragraph (b) of the definition substitute loss carry-forward recapture amount in subsection 2(1) occurs, in an amount equal to the tax credits used by the constituent entity solely as a result of the recharacterization of income in the recharacterization year, to the extent that

Subparagraph.Label: (i)
Subparagraph.Text: the tax credits arise under the income tax laws of the particular jurisdiction in respect of tax paid to the government of a jurisdiction other than the particular jurisdiction,

Subparagraph.Label: (ii)
Subparagraph.Text: the amount of the recharacterized income in the recharacterization year, together with the total amounts of recharacterized income in the preceding fiscal years, does not exceed the substitute loss carry-forward recapture amount, and

Subparagraph.Label: (iii)
Subparagraph.Text: the tax credits are used to reduce or eliminate covered taxes that would otherwise be owing by the constituent entity under the income tax laws of the particular jurisdiction in respect of any amount of income that is included in computing the constituent entity’s GloBE income or loss.

Subsection.MarginalNote: Deferred tax asset below minimum rate
Subsection.Text: The amount of a deferred tax asset recorded in the financial accounts of a constituent entity of an MNE group for a fiscal year is deemed to be the amount that it would be if the tax rate applicable in determining the amount of the deferred tax asset were the minimum rate, if the following conditions are met:

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: the tax rate that would, in the absence of this subsection, be applicable in determining the amount of the deferred tax asset is less than the minimum rate; and

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: the deferred tax asset is a loss deferred tax asset that is attributable to a GloBE loss of the constituent entity for the fiscal year.

Subsection.Text: For the purpose of applying subsection 31(1) in a fiscal year (referred to in this subsection as the “current fiscal year”), the adjusted covered taxes of a constituent entity for a fiscal year (referred to in this subsection as the “adjustment fiscal year”) that is the fifth fiscal year preceding the current fiscal year are to be reduced to the extent of all or the portion of any deferred tax liability that is

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: included in determining the total deferred tax adjustment amount of the constituent entity for the adjustment fiscal year;

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: not paid in any of the five fiscal years following the adjustment fiscal year; and

Paragraph.Label: (c)
Paragraph.Text: not a recapture exception accrual.

Section.Text: If a filing constituent entity of a particular MNE group elects, in respect of a jurisdiction that does not have an eligible distribution tax system, for the GloBE transition year of the particular MNE group in respect of the jurisdiction, the following rules apply:

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: paragraphs (b) and (c) apply in respect of each fiscal year (referred to in this section as an “election year”) of the particular MNE group that is the GloBE transition year or that occurs after the GloBE transition year but before the revocation year in respect of the election;

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: a GloBE loss deferred tax asset of the particular MNE group, in respect of the jurisdiction, is deemed to arise in any election year in which the particular MNE group has a net GloBE loss in respect of the jurisdiction, in an amount determined by the formula

FormulaDefinition.Text: is the absolute value of the net GloBE loss for the election year, and
is the minimum rate;

Paragraph.Label: (c)
Paragraph.Text: for the purposes of applying paragraph 22(2)(b) in respect of an election year (referred to in this paragraph as the “application year”) in which the particular MNE group has net GloBE income in respect of the jurisdiction, a particular constituent entity that is located in the jurisdiction is considered to have reversed a particular GloBE loss deferred tax asset of the particular MNE group in respect of the jurisdiction that arose in a preceding election year (referred to in this paragraph as the “loss election year”), in an amount determined by the formula

FormulaDefinition.Text: is the lesser of

FormulaParagraph.Label: (i)
FormulaParagraph.Text: the amount determined by the formula

FormulaDefinition.Text: is the particular MNE group’s net GloBE income in respect of the jurisdiction for the application year,
is the minimum rate, and
is the total of all amounts each is which is the amount determined by the formula
is the amount of another GloBE loss deferred tax asset of the particular MNE group, in respect of the jurisdiction, that arose in another election year preceding the loss election year, and

is the total of all amounts each of which is the portion of the other GloBE loss deferred tax asset that was considered to have been applied by a constituent entity in an election year preceding the application year, and

FormulaParagraph.Label: (ii)
FormulaParagraph.Text: the amount determined by the formula

FormulaDefinition.Text: is the particular GloBE loss deferred tax asset, and

is the total of all amounts each of which is all or the portion of the particular GloBE loss deferred tax asset that was considered to have been reversed by a constituent entity in an election year preceding the application year,
is the particular constituent entity’s GloBE income for the application year, and
is the total of all amounts each of which is the GloBE income of any constituent entity of the particular MNE group that is located in the jurisdiction for the application year; and

Paragraph.Label: (d)
Paragraph.Text: if the ultimate parent entity of the particular MNE group is a flow-through entity that is located in the jurisdiction, paragraphs (b) and (c) are to be applied in relation to the constituent entities of the particular MNE group that are located in the jurisdiction as if the ultimate parent entity were

Subparagraph.Label: (i)
Subparagraph.Text: the only constituent entity, of a separate MNE group, that is located in the jurisdiction, and

Subparagraph.Label: (ii)
Subparagraph.Text: not a constituent entity, of the particular MNE group, that is located in the jurisdiction.

Heading.Label: SUBDIVISION E
Heading.TitleText: Post-Filing Adjustments and Tax Rate Changes

Section.MarginalNote: Adjustments to covered taxes for a prior year

Subsection.Text: If, in a fiscal year (referred to in this subsection as the “current year”), there is an adjustment to the liability for covered taxes, recorded in the financial accounts, of a particular constituent entity of an MNE group for a prior fiscal year that are relevant in determining its adjusted covered taxes for the prior year, the following rules apply:

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: if the adjustment results in an increase in the liability, or an immaterial decrease in the liability,

Subparagraph.Label: (i)
Subparagraph.Text: where the adjustment relates to a change, in the particular constituent entity’s deferred tax expense arising in the prior year, to which subsection (2) applies, the particular constituent entity’s adjusted covered taxes for the fiscal year in which the deferred tax expense is reversed are to be increased to reflect the increase in the liability to the extent that it would not, in the absence of this subsection, already be reflected in the adjusted covered taxes of the particular constituent entity for any fiscal year, and

Subparagraph.Label: (ii)
Subparagraph.Text: in any other case, the particular constituent entity’s adjusted covered taxes for the current year are to be increased or reduced, as the case may be, to reflect the increase or immaterial decrease in the liability to the extent that it would not, in the absence of this subsection, already be reflected in the adjusted covered taxes of the particular constituent entity for any fiscal year;

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: if the adjustment results in a decrease (other than an immaterial decrease) in the liability, for the purposes of applying subsection 31(1) in the current year

Subparagraph.Label: (i)
Subparagraph.Text: the particular constituent entity’s adjusted covered taxes for the prior year are to be reduced to reflect the decrease in the liability,

Subparagraph.Label: (ii)
Subparagraph.Text: the particular constituent entity’s GloBE income or loss for the prior year is to be adjusted to the extent

Clause.Label: (A)
Clause.Text: the decrease in the liability results from a reduction in the particular constituent entity’s GloBE income or an increase in its GloBE loss for the prior year, and

Clause.Label: (B)
Clause.Text: it is necessary to ensure there is no reduction in the MNE group’s effective tax rate (determined without reference to this subsection), in respect of the jurisdiction in which the particular constituent entity is located, for the prior year, and

Subparagraph.Label: (iii)
Subparagraph.Text: the GloBE income or loss, of the particular constituent entity and any other constituent entity of the MNE group that is located in the jurisdiction, for any fiscal year subsequent to the prior year, is to be adjusted, as necessary and appropriate, to reflect the decrease in the liability;

Paragraph.Label: (c)
Paragraph.Text: for the purposes of paragraphs (a) and (b), the adjustment results in an immaterial decrease if

Subparagraph.Label: (i)
Subparagraph.Text: the filing constituent entity of the MNE group elects under this paragraph in respect of the adjustment,

Subparagraph.Label: (ii)
Subparagraph.Text: the adjustment results in a decrease in the liability, and

Subparagraph.Label: (iii)
Subparagraph.Text: the amount determined by the following formula is less than €1 million:

FormulaDefinition.Text: is the total of all amounts each of which is an adjustment in the current year resulting in a decrease to the liability for covered taxes, recorded in the financial accounts, of any constituent entity that is located in the jurisdiction for the prior year that are relevant in determining its adjusted covered taxes for the prior year, and
is the amount that would be determined for A if the reference in the description of A to “decrease” were read as a reference to “increase”; and

Paragraph.Label: (d)
Paragraph.Text: to the extent the adjustment arises because a loss for tax purposes for any fiscal year following the prior year is carried back to reduce income for tax purposes for the prior year, the particular constituent entity is deemed to have a deferred tax asset that

Subparagraph.Label: (i)
Subparagraph.Text: arises in the current year,

Subparagraph.Label: (ii)
Subparagraph.Text: is equal to the portion of the loss for tax purposes that reduces income for tax purposes for the prior year multiplied by the minimum rate, and

Subparagraph.Label: (iii)
Subparagraph.Text: is treated as having been reversed in the prior year for the purposes of applying subsection 31(1) in respect of the prior year.

Subsection.Text: For the purposes of subsection (1), a change, in a fiscal year (referred to in this subsection as the “current year”), in a constituent entity’s deferred tax expense that arose in a prior fiscal year is to be treated as an adjustment, in the current year, to the constituent entity’s liability for covered taxes, recorded in the financial accounts, for the prior year to the extent that

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: the change results from a reduction, in the current year, to the rate of tax — that was applicable in determining the deferred tax expense for the prior year — below the minimum rate; and

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: the deferred tax expense was reflected in determining the constituent entity’s total deferred tax adjustment amount for the prior year.

Subsection.Text: For the purposes of subsection (1),

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: a change, in a particular fiscal year, in a constituent entity’s deferred tax expense that arose in a prior fiscal year is to be treated as an adjustment, in the fiscal year in which the deferred tax expense is reversed, to the constituent entity’s liability for covered taxes, recorded in the financial accounts, for the prior year to the extent that

Subparagraph.Label: (i)
Subparagraph.Text: the change results from an increase, in the particular year, to the rate of tax — that was applicable in determining the deferred tax expense for the prior year — from a rate that was less than the minimum rate, and

Subparagraph.Label: (ii)
Subparagraph.Text: the deferred tax expense was reflected in determining the constituent entity’s total deferred tax adjustment amount for the prior year; and

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: any portion of the change that is attributable to an increase of the rate of tax in excess of the minimum rate is to be disregarded in determining the adjustment under paragraph (a).

Subsection.Text: For the purposes of applying subsection 31(1) in a fiscal year (referred to in this subsection as the “current year”), a constituent entity’s adjusted covered taxes for another fiscal year (referred to in this subsection as the “prior year”) are to be adjusted to exclude any portion of the current tax expense that is recorded, in respect of covered taxes, in the constituent entity’s financial accounts for the prior year and included in its adjusted covered taxes for the prior year, if

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: the portion is not paid by the day (referred to in this subsection as the “specified day”) that is three years after the last day of the prior year;

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: the specified day is within the current year; and

Paragraph.Label: (c)
Paragraph.Text: the portion is greater than €1 million.

Subsection.Text: The following definitions apply in this section.

Definition.Text: adjusted investment amount, of an owner in respect of a qualified flow-through ownership interest for a fiscal year (referred to in this definition as the “determination year”), means the amount determined by the formula

FormulaDefinition.Text: is the investment amount of the owner in respect of the ownership interest;
is the total of all amounts each of which is the qualified flow-through tax benefits of the owner in respect of the ownership interest for a fiscal year preceding the determination year; and

is the total of all amounts each of which is the other flow-through amounts of the owner in respect of the ownership interest for the determination year or any preceding fiscal year. (montant d’investissement ajusté)

Definition.Text: excess benefits, of an owner in respect of a proportional amortization method interest for a particular fiscal year, means the amount determined by the formula

FormulaDefinition.Text: is

FormulaParagraph.Label: (a)
FormulaParagraph.Text: if the amount determined for C is equal to the proportional investment reduction amount of the owner in respect of the interest for the particular fiscal year, the other flow-through amounts of the owner in respect of the interest for the particular fiscal year, and

FormulaParagraph.Label: (b)
FormulaParagraph.Text: in any other case, the lesser of

FormulaParagraph.Label: (i)
FormulaParagraph.Text: the other flow-through amounts of the owner in respect of the interest for the particular fiscal year, and

FormulaParagraph.Label: (ii)
FormulaParagraph.Text: the amount determined by the formula

FormulaDefinition.Text: is the proportional amortization method investment remaining amount of the owner in respect of the interest for the fiscal year immediately preceding the particular fiscal year, and
is the qualified flow-through tax benefits of the owner in respect of the interest for the fiscal year immediately preceding the particular fiscal year;

is the flow-through tax benefits of the owner in respect of the interest for the particular fiscal year, to the extent that the owner’s current tax expense in respect of covered taxes in its financial accounts can reasonably be considered to have been increased (or to not have been reduced) solely because of the application of the proportional amortization method, or another financial accounting method that provides similar results as to current tax expense, in respect of the interest for the particular fiscal year; and
is the lesser of

FormulaParagraph.Label: (a)
FormulaParagraph.Text: the amount determined for subparagraph (b)(ii) of the description of A, and

FormulaParagraph.Label: (b)
FormulaParagraph.Text: the proportional investment reduction amount of the owner in respect of the interest for the particular fiscal year. (bénéfices excédentaires)

Definition.Text: expected tax benefits ratio, of an owner in respect of a proportional amortization method interest for a fiscal year, means the amount determined by the formula

FormulaDefinition.Text: is the flow-through tax benefits of the owner in respect of the interest for the fiscal year; and

is the total amount of flow-through tax benefits that the owner reasonably expects, at the time when the interest is first acquired, to receive in respect of the interest. (ratio des avantages fiscaux attendus)

Definition.Text: flow-through tax benefits, of an owner in respect of a qualified flow-through ownership interest for a fiscal year, means the total of all amounts each of which is

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: the tax benefit, in respect of a tax credit (other than a qualified refundable tax credit or marketable transferable tax credit of the owner), received by the owner in respect of the ownership interest for the fiscal year; or

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: the tax benefit, in respect of a tax loss, received by the owner in respect of the ownership interest for the fiscal year. (avantages fiscaux intermédiaires)

Definition.Text: investment amount, of an owner in respect of an ownership interest, means the total fair market value of all consideration provided by the owner for the ownership interest. (montant d’investissement)

other flow-through amounts, of an owner in respect of a qualified flow-through ownership interest for a fiscal year, means the total of the following amounts received by the owner in respect of the ownership interest in the fiscal year:

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: the tax benefits of qualified refundable tax credits and marketable transferable tax credits of the owner;

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: distributions (including returns of capital); and

Paragraph.Label: (c)
Paragraph.Text: proceeds from sales of all or part of the ownership interest. (autres montants intermédiaires)

Definition.Text: proportional amortization method interest means a qualified flow-through ownership interest in respect of which the owner uses the proportional amortization method for financial accounting purposes. (participation selon la méthode d’amortissement proportionnelle)

proportional amortization method investment remaining amount, of an owner in respect of a proportional amortization method interest for a fiscal year (referred to in this definition as the “determination year”), means the amount determined by the formula

FormulaDefinition.Text: is the investment amount of the owner in respect of the interest; and
is the total of all amounts each of which is the lesser of the following amounts for the determination year or a preceding fiscal year:

FormulaParagraph.Label: (a)
FormulaParagraph.Text: the amount determined by the formula

FormulaDefinition.Text: is

FormulaParagraph.Label: (i)
FormulaParagraph.Text: in the case of the determination year, nil, and

FormulaParagraph.Label: (ii)
FormulaParagraph.Text: in any other case, the qualified flow-through tax benefits of the owner in respect of the interest for the fiscal year, and

FormulaDefinition.Text: is the other flow-through amounts of the owner in respect of the interest for the fiscal year, and

FormulaParagraph.Label: (b)
FormulaParagraph.Text: the proportional investment reduction amount of the owner in respect of the interest for the fiscal year. (montant de l’investissement résiduel selon la méthode d’amortissement proportionnelle)

Definition.Text: proportional investment reduction amount, of an owner in respect of a proportional amortization method interest for a fiscal year, means the amount determined by the formula

FormulaDefinition.Text: is the investment amount of the owner in respect of the interest; and
is the expected tax benefits ratio of the owner in respect of the interest for the fiscal year. (montant de la réduction de l’investissement proportionnel)

Definition.Text: qualified flow-through ownership interest means, subject to subsection (5), an ownership interest in a particular tax transparent entity held by a constituent entity of an MNE group directly, or indirectly through one or more other tax transparent entities that are not constituent entities of the MNE group, if

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: the assets, liabilities, income, expenses and cash flows of the particular tax transparent entity are not consolidated on a line-by-line basis in the consolidated financial statements of the ultimate parent entity of the MNE group; and

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: at the time the ownership interest was acquired by the owner, the total return to be received by the owner (including distributions, the tax benefits of tax losses and the tax benefits of qualified refundable tax credits and marketable transferable tax credits of the owner received in respect of the ownership interest, but excluding the tax benefits of tax credits other than qualified refundable tax credits and marketable transferable tax credits of the owner) from its investment in the ownership interest could not reasonably have been expected to be greater than or equal to the investment amount of the owner in respect of the ownership interest. (titre de participation intermédiaire admissible)

Definition.Text: qualified flow-through tax benefits, of an owner in respect of a qualified flow-through ownership interest for a fiscal year in which the ownership interest is subject to an election under subsection 18(7), means

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: if the ownership interest is a proportional amortization method interest, the least of

Subparagraph.Label: (i)
Subparagraph.Text: the flow-through tax benefits of the owner in respect of the ownership interest for the fiscal year,

Subparagraph.Label: (ii)
Subparagraph.Text: the proportional amortization method investment remaining amount of the owner in respect of the ownership interest for the fiscal year, and

Subparagraph.Label: (iii)
Subparagraph.Text: the amount, if any, by which the proportional investment reduction amount, of the owner in respect of the ownership interest for the fiscal year, exceeds the other flow-through amounts of the owner in respect of the ownership interest for the fiscal year; and

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: in any other case, the lesser of

Subparagraph.Label: (i)
Subparagraph.Text: the flow-through tax benefits of the owner in respect of the ownership interest for the fiscal year, and

Subparagraph.Label: (ii)
Subparagraph.Text: the adjusted investment amount of the owner in respect of the ownership interest for the fiscal year. (avantages fiscaux intermédiaires admissibles)

Definition.Text: recapture amount, of an owner in respect of a qualified flow-through ownership interest for a particular fiscal year, means the lesser of

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: the amount determined by the formula

FormulaDefinition.Text: is the other flow-through amounts of the owner in respect of the ownership interest for the particular fiscal year,
is

FormulaParagraph.Label: (i)
FormulaParagraph.Text: if the ownership interest is a proportional amortization method interest,

FormulaParagraph.Label: (A)
FormulaParagraph.Text: where the amount determined for C in the formula in the definition excess benefits in this subsection is equal to the proportional investment reduction amount of the owner in respect of the ownership interest for the particular fiscal year, the amount determined for A, and

FormulaParagraph.Label: (B)
FormulaParagraph.Text: in any other case, the proportional amortization method investment remaining amount of the owner in respect of the ownership interest for the fiscal year immediately preceding the particular fiscal year, and

FormulaParagraph.Label: (ii)
FormulaParagraph.Text: in any other case, the adjusted investment amount of the owner in respect of the ownership interest for the fiscal year immediately preceding the particular fiscal year, and

FormulaDefinition.Text: is

FormulaParagraph.Label: (i)
FormulaParagraph.Text: where clause (i)(A) of the description of B applies, nil, and

FormulaParagraph.Label: (ii)
FormulaParagraph.Text: in any other case, the qualified flow-through tax benefits of the owner in respect of the ownership interest for the fiscal year immediately preceding the particular fiscal year, and

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: the amount determined by the formula

FormulaDefinition.Text: is the total of all amounts each of which is the qualified flow-through tax benefits of the owner in respect of the ownership interest for a fiscal year preceding the particular fiscal year, and
is the total of all amounts each of which is the recapture amount of the owner in respect of the ownership interest for a fiscal year preceding the particular fiscal year. (montant de récupération)

Definition.Text: tax benefit, of an owner in respect of a qualified flow-through ownership interest

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: includes, in respect of a tax credit,

Subparagraph.Label: (i)
Subparagraph.Text: a refund received by the owner in respect of the tax credit, and

Subparagraph.Label: (ii)
Subparagraph.Text: any amount received by the owner in exchange for the transfer of the tax credit; and

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: means, in respect of a tax loss attributed to the owner in respect of the ownership interest, the product obtained by multiplying the amount of the tax loss by the statutory income tax rate applicable to the owner in the jurisdiction where it is located. (avantage fiscal)

Subsection.MarginalNote: Adjusted covered taxes — additions and reductions
Subsection.Text: If an owner holds a qualified flow-through ownership interest in another entity, the adjusted covered taxes of the owner for a fiscal year are deemed to be the amount that would, in the absence of section 8, be determined by the formula

FormulaDefinition.Text: is the adjusted covered taxes of the owner for the fiscal year, as determined without regard to any amount determined for B or C in respect of the ownership interest for the fiscal year;
is

FormulaParagraph.Label: (a)
FormulaParagraph.Text: if the ownership interest is a proportional amortization method interest, the amount determined by the formula

FormulaDefinition.Text: is the qualified flow-through tax benefits, if any, of the owner in respect of the ownership interest for the fiscal year, and

is the amount by which the owner’s current tax expense in respect of covered taxes in its financial accounts can reasonably be considered to have been increased (or to not have been reduced) in respect of those qualified flow-through tax benefits solely because of the application of the proportional amortization method, or another financial accounting method that provides similar results as to current tax expense, in respect of the ownership interest for the fiscal year, and

FormulaParagraph.Label: (b)
FormulaParagraph.Text: in any other case, the lesser of

FormulaParagraph.Label: (i)
FormulaParagraph.Text: the qualified flow-through tax benefits, if any, of the owner in respect of the ownership interest for the fiscal year, and

FormulaParagraph.Label: (ii)
FormulaParagraph.Text: the amount by which the owner’s current tax expense in respect of covered taxes in its financial accounts can reasonably be considered to have been reduced in the fiscal year because of those qualified flow-through tax benefits; and

FormulaDefinition.Text: is the amount determined by the formula
is

FormulaParagraph.Label: (a)
FormulaParagraph.Text: if the ownership interest is a proportional amortization method interest, the excess benefits of the owner in respect of the ownership interest for the fiscal year, and

FormulaParagraph.Label: (b)
FormulaParagraph.Text: in any other case, the amount by which the flow-through tax benefits of the owner in respect of the ownership interest for the fiscal year exceeds the adjusted investment amount of the owner in respect of the ownership interest for the fiscal year, except to the extent that the owner’s current tax expense in respect of covered taxes in its financial accounts can reasonably be considered to have been reduced in the fiscal year because of those flow-through tax benefits, and

FormulaDefinition.Text: is the recapture amount of the owner in respect of the ownership interest for the fiscal year.

Subsection.Text: A qualified flow-through ownership interest held by an owner that is a constituent entity of an MNE group that would not, in the absence of this subsection, be a proportional amortization method interest is irrevocably deemed to be a proportional amortization method interest if the filing constituent entity of the MNE group so elects in the later of

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: the fiscal year in which the ownership interest is first acquired by the owner; and

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: the first fiscal year in which

Subparagraph.Label: (i)
Subparagraph.Text: the owner is subject to a qualified IIR, qualified UTPR or qualified domestic minimum top-up tax, and

Subparagraph.Label: (ii)
Subparagraph.Text: the owner is a constituent entity of the MNE group.

Subsection.Text: For the purposes of this section, an investment, other than an ownership interest, in a particular tax transparent entity held by a particular constituent entity of an MNE group directly, or indirectly through one or more other tax transparent entities that are not constituent entities of the MNE group, is deemed to be an ownership interest held by the particular constituent entity in the particular tax transparent entity if the investment

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: is treated as an equity interest under the income tax laws of the jurisdiction in which the particular constituent entity is located; and

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: would be treated as an equity interest under an authorized financial accounting standard of the jurisdiction in which the particular tax transparent entity operates.

Subsection.Text: An ownership interest in an entity held by an owner that would, in the absence of this subsection, be a qualified flow-through ownership interest is not a qualified flow-through ownership interest if

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: the owner

Subparagraph.Label: (i)
Subparagraph.Text: does not have a bona fide economic interest in the entity, or

Subparagraph.Label: (ii)
Subparagraph.Text: is protected from the loss of its investment in the entity; or

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: the tax laws of the jurisdiction in which the entity operates make receipt of the tax benefit in respect of any tax credits of the entity by the owner conditional on the owner or the developer of the project that originates the tax credits being subject to a qualified IIR, qualified UTPR or qualified domestic minimum top-up tax.

Heading.Label: DIVISION 4
Heading.TitleText: Computation of Effective Tax Rate and Top-up Amount

Subsection.Text: The effective tax rate, of an MNE group for a jurisdiction for a fiscal year, means

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: if the net GloBE income of the MNE group for the jurisdiction for the fiscal year is nil, the minimum rate; and

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: in any other case, the result (expressed as a percentage rounded to four decimal points) of the formula

FormulaDefinition.Text: is the jurisdictional adjusted covered taxes of the MNE group for the jurisdiction for the fiscal year,
is the lesser of

FormulaParagraph.Label: (i)
FormulaParagraph.Text: the amount determined for A, and

FormulaParagraph.Label: (ii)
FormulaParagraph.Text: the excess negative tax expense of the MNE group for the jurisdiction for the fiscal year, and

FormulaDefinition.Text: is the net GloBE income of the MNE group for the jurisdiction for the fiscal year.

Subsection.Text: The net GloBE income, of an MNE group for a jurisdiction for a fiscal year, means the amount determined by the formula

FormulaDefinition.Text: is the total of all amounts each of which is the GloBE income for the fiscal year of a standard constituent entity of the MNE group that is located in the jurisdiction; and
is the total of all amounts each of which is the GloBE loss for the fiscal year of a standard constituent entity of the MNE group that is located in the jurisdiction.

Subsection.MarginalNote: Definition of jurisdictional adjusted covered taxes
Subsection.Text: The jurisdictional adjusted covered taxes, of an MNE group for a jurisdiction for a fiscal year, means the total of all amounts each of which is the adjusted covered taxes for the fiscal year of a standard constituent entity of the MNE group that is located in the jurisdiction.

Subsection.MarginalNote: Definition of excess negative tax expense
Subsection.Text: The excess negative tax expense, of an MNE group for a jurisdiction for a particular fiscal year, means the amount determined by the formula

FormulaDefinition.Text: is the absolute value of the total of all amounts each of which is the jurisdictional adjusted covered taxes of the MNE group for the jurisdiction for a fiscal year

FormulaParagraph.Label: (a)
FormulaParagraph.Text: that precedes the particular fiscal year,

FormulaParagraph.Label: (b)
FormulaParagraph.Text: in which the amount that would, in the absence of section 8, be the net GloBE income of the MNE group for the jurisdiction is nil or greater, and

FormulaParagraph.Label: (c)
FormulaParagraph.Text: in which the jurisdictional adjusted covered taxes of the MNE group for the jurisdiction are less than nil;

FormulaDefinition.Text: is the total of all amounts each of which is the amount by which the excess negative tax expense top-up amount, of a standard constituent entity of the MNE group that is located in the jurisdiction, for a fiscal year that precedes the particular fiscal year, is reduced because of an election under subsection 31(5); and

is the total of all amounts each of which is the amount determined for B in the formula in paragraph (1)(b) in respect of the MNE group for the jurisdiction for a fiscal year, that precedes the particular fiscal year, in which that paragraph applies.

Heading.Label: SUBDIVISION B
Heading.TitleText: Top-up Amount of a Standard Constituent Entity

Subsection.Text: The top-up amount, of a particular standard constituent entity of an MNE group that is located in a jurisdiction for a fiscal year, means

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: if the net GloBE income of the MNE group for the jurisdiction for the fiscal year is greater than nil, the amount determined by the formula

FormulaDefinition.Text: is the jurisdictional top-up amount of the MNE group for the jurisdiction for the fiscal year,
is the GloBE income of the particular standard constituent entity for the fiscal year, and
is the total of all amounts each of which is the GloBE income, of a standard constituent entity of the MNE group that is located in the jurisdiction, for the fiscal year; and

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: if the net GloBE income of the MNE group for the jurisdiction for the fiscal year is nil, the total of

Subparagraph.Label: (i)
Subparagraph.Text: the allocated adjustment top-up amount of the particular standard constituent entity for the fiscal year, and

Subparagraph.Label: (ii)
Subparagraph.Text: where the jurisdictional adjusted covered taxes of the MNE group for the jurisdiction for the fiscal year is less than nil, the excess negative tax expense top-up amount of the particular standard constituent entity for the fiscal year.

Subsection.Text: The jurisdictional top-up amount, of an MNE group for a jurisdiction for a fiscal year, means the amount determined by the formula

FormulaDefinition.Text: is the top-up percentage of the MNE group for the jurisdiction for the fiscal year;
is the excess profit of the MNE group for the jurisdiction for the fiscal year;
is the total of all amounts each of which is an adjustment top-up amount of the MNE group for the jurisdiction for the fiscal year; and

is the total amount of tax payable for a fiscal year, in respect of the standard constituent entities of the MNE group that are located in the jurisdiction, under a qualified domestic minimum top-up tax of the jurisdiction.

Subsection.Text: The top-up percentage, of an MNE group for a jurisdiction for a fiscal year, means the percentage point difference determined by the formula

FormulaDefinition.Text: is the minimum rate; and
is the effective tax rate of the MNE group for the jurisdiction for the fiscal year.

Subsection.Text: The excess profit, of an MNE group for a jurisdiction for a fiscal year, means the amount determined by the formula

FormulaDefinition.Text: is the net GloBE income of the MNE group for the jurisdiction for the fiscal year; and
is the substance-based income exclusion amount of the MNE group for the jurisdiction for the fiscal year.

Subsection.MarginalNote: Definition of allocated adjustment top-up amount
Subsection.Text: The allocated adjustment top-up amount of a particular standard constituent entity of an MNE group that is located in a jurisdiction for a particular fiscal year means the total of all amounts each of which is determined by the formula

FormulaDefinition.Text: is a particular adjustment top-up amount of the MNE group for the jurisdiction for the particular fiscal year;
is the amount determined by the formula

is the total amount of tax payable for the particular fiscal year, in respect of the standard constituent entities of the MNE group that are located in the jurisdiction, under a qualified domestic minimum top-up tax of the jurisdiction,
is the total of all adjustment top-up amounts of the MNE group for the jurisdiction for the particular fiscal year, and

is the jurisdictional excess negative tax expense top-up amount of the MNE group for the jurisdiction for the particular fiscal year, if the formula in that definition in subsection 31(4) were read without reference to C;

is the GloBE income of the particular standard constituent entity, for the adjustment year to which the particular adjustment top-up amount relates, as adjusted because of the application of any ETR adjustment provision in the particular fiscal year or any preceding fiscal year; and

is the total of all amounts each of which is the GloBE income, for the adjustment year, of a standard constituent entity of the MNE group that is located in the jurisdiction, as adjusted because of the application of any ETR adjustment provision in the particular fiscal year or any preceding fiscal year.

Subsection.Text: For the purposes of determining an adjustment top-up amount of an MNE group for a jurisdiction for a fiscal year, if an ETR adjustment provision applies in the fiscal year to adjust, for the purposes of this subsection, the GloBE income or loss or adjusted covered taxes of any standard constituent entity of the MNE group that is located in the jurisdiction, or the jurisdictional adjusted covered taxes of the MNE group for the jurisdiction, for an adjustment year, the following rules apply:

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: the jurisdictional top-up amount of the MNE group for the jurisdiction for the adjustment year (referred to in this subsection as the “recalculated jurisdictional top-up amount”) is calculated taking into account the adjustment; and

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: the amount determined by the following formula is an adjustment top-up amount of the MNE group for the jurisdiction for the fiscal year:

FormulaDefinition.Text: is the recalculated jurisdictional top-up amount of the MNE group for the jurisdiction for the adjustment year,
is the jurisdictional top-up amount of the MNE group for the jurisdiction for the adjustment year, determined without reference to paragraph (a), and
is

FormulaParagraph.Label: (i)
FormulaParagraph.Text: the disposition recapture ratio, if the adjustment is an adjustment to adjusted covered taxes under subsection 37(5), and

FormulaParagraph.Label: (ii)
FormulaParagraph.Text: 1, in any other case.

Subsection.MarginalNote: Definition of excess negative tax expense top-up amount
Subsection.Text: Subject to subsection (5), the excess negative tax expense top-up amount of a particular negative tax expense constituent entity of an MNE group that is located in a jurisdiction for a fiscal year means the amount determined by the formula

FormulaDefinition.Text: is the jurisdictional excess negative tax expense top-up amount of the MNE group for the jurisdiction for the fiscal year;
is the amount determined by the formula
is the GloBE income or loss of the particular negative tax expense constituent entity for the fiscal year,
is the minimum rate, and
is the adjusted covered taxes of the particular negative tax expense constituent entity for the fiscal year; and
is the total of all amounts each of which is the amount determined for B for a negative tax expense constituent entity of the MNE group for the jurisdiction for the fiscal year.

Subsection.MarginalNote: Definition of negative tax expense constituent entity
Subsection.Text: A negative tax expense constituent entity, in respect of an MNE group for a fiscal year, means a standard constituent entity of the MNE group whose adjusted covered taxes for the fiscal year are less than each of the following amounts:

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: nil; and

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: the amount that would, in the absence of section 8, be determined by the formula

FormulaDefinition.Text: is the GloBE income or loss of the entity for the fiscal year, and
is the minimum rate.

Subsection.MarginalNote: Definition of jurisdictional excess negative tax expense top-up amount
Subsection.Text: The jurisdictional excess negative tax expense top-up amount, of an MNE group for a jurisdiction for a fiscal year in which its net GloBE income for the jurisdiction is nil and its jurisdictional adjusted covered taxes for the jurisdiction is less than nil, means the amount determined by the formula

FormulaDefinition.Text: is the amount that would, in the absence of section 8, be determined by the formula
is the total of all amounts each of which is the GloBE income or loss for the fiscal year of a standard constituent entity of the MNE group that is located in the jurisdiction, and
is the minimum rate;
is the jurisdictional adjusted covered taxes of the MNE group for the jurisdiction for the fiscal year; and
is the amount determined by the formula

is the total amount of tax payable for the fiscal year, in respect of the standard constituent entities of the MNE group that are located in the jurisdiction, under a qualified domestic minimum top-up tax of the jurisdiction, and
is the total of all adjustment top-up amounts of the MNE group for the jurisdiction for the fiscal year.

Subsection.MarginalNote: Election — excess negative tax expense carry-forward
Subsection.Text: If the filing constituent entity of an MNE group elects for a jurisdiction for a fiscal year, the excess negative tax expense top-up amount of a standard constituent entity of the MNE group that is located in the jurisdiction for the fiscal year is deemed to be the greater of

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: nil; and

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: the portion of the excess negative tax expense top-up amount, determined without reference to this subsection, that can reasonably be considered to relate to a tax loss that was carried back from the fiscal year to another fiscal year of the MNE group ending before the fiscal year and deducted under the income tax laws of the jurisdiction in the other fiscal year.

Section.MarginalNote: Definition of substance-based income exclusion amount

Subsection.Text: Subject to subsection (16), the substance-based income exclusion amount of an MNE group for a jurisdiction for a fiscal year means the lesser of

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: the total of all amounts each of which is determined by the formula

FormulaDefinition.Text: is, subject to subsection 49(1), 5% of the eligible payroll costs of a standard constituent entity of the MNE group that is located in the jurisdiction for the fiscal year, and
is, subject to subsection 49(2), 5% of the eligible tangible asset amount of the standard constituent entity for the fiscal year, and

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: the portion of the amount described in paragraph (a) that the filing constituent entity of the MNE group specifies as the substance-based income exclusion amount of the MNE group for the jurisdiction in the GIR in respect of the MNE group for the fiscal year.

Subsection.Text: Subject to subsections (5) to (7) and subparagraph 38(1)(d)(i), the eligible payroll costs of a particular standard constituent entity of an MNE group for a fiscal year, means all payroll costs (other than excluded costs of the particular standard constituent entity) in respect of eligible employees of any standard constituent entity of the MNE group, incurred

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: if the particular standard constituent entity is a permanent establishment, by the main entity in respect of the permanent establishment and reflected in the separate financial accounts for the fiscal year of the permanent establishment, as adjusted in accordance with clause 17(1)(b)(ii)(B) or subsection 17(2); and

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: in any other case, by the particular standard constituent entity and reflected in the particular standard constituent entity’s financial accounts for the fiscal year.

Subsection.Text: Excluded costs, of a particular standard constituent entity of an MNE group, means any costs if

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: it is not the case that

Subparagraph.Label: (i)
Subparagraph.Text: the costs are payable primarily in respect of work done in the course of the ordinary operating activities of any standard constituent entity of the MNE group, and

Subparagraph.Label: (ii)
Subparagraph.Text: that work is done in the jurisdiction in which the particular standard constituent entity is located;

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: the costs are capitalized and included in the carrying value of an asset used to calculate the eligible tangible asset amount of any constituent entity of the MNE group, as determined without reference to subsection (11);

Paragraph.Label: (c)
Paragraph.Text: where the particular standard constituent entity is the main entity in respect of a permanent establishment, the costs are reflected in the separate financial accounts of the permanent establishment as adjusted in accordance with clause 17(1)(b)(ii)(B) or subsection 17(2);

Paragraph.Label: (d)
Paragraph.Text: the costs are core international shipping costs, or ancillary international shipping costs that can reasonably be considered to be attributable to qualified ancillary international shipping income, of any constituent entity of the MNE group; or

Paragraph.Label: (e)
Paragraph.Text: where the particular standard constituent entity is a permanent establishment, the costs can reasonably be considered to be attributable to income that is excluded from the GloBE income or loss of the particular standard constituent entity under paragraph 17(6)(a) or subsection 20(4).
